description: A Chinese settings-page request can route and validate with a complete spec.

spec.first_visual_focus: Current workspace defaults and save status

user_flow.entry: Admin opens Settings from the sidebar
user_flow.feedback: Inline success or validation feedback appears in the edited section

spec.layout_strategy: Grouped focused form with dangerous actions separated

interaction_states.empty: No custom defaults message with restore action
interaction_states.error: Inline validation and save failure recovery
interaction_states.success: Saved status appears near the primary action

acceptance_criteria: Primary save action is visible after editing a setting
Loading, empty, and error states preserve the settings layout
